Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is significantly more complex than the ground truth diagram. It includes many additional components, labels, and connections that are not present in the ground truth. This complexity may make it difficult for non-technical stakeholders to understand.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram includes numerous additional elements and connections that are not present in the ground truth. It also lacks the simple, high-level structure of the ground truth, which focuses on a few key components and their interactions.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram uses different symbols, styles, and notations compared to the ground truth. The structural and semantic alignment with the ground truth is lacking due to the introduction of many new elements and a different layout.
